content: GitHub Verified badge: committer email must match an identity on the GPG key AND a verified email on the account owning the key. Hosted Renovate app gets Verified via GitHub App API commits (GitHub signs with its own key). Self-hosted Renovate: RENOVATE_GIT_PRIVATE_KEY GPG env var; must register key on bot account and match gitAuthor email or commits sign but never verify. Gitea marks Verified only if commit email is registered on the account owning the key. GitLab: committer email must match verified email of GPG key owner; GitLab uses its own keyring, no keyservers.
